name: en-quire-monorepo
description: Monorepo root for @nullproof-studio/en-core, en-quire, and en-scribe.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @nullproof-studio/en-core && npm run build -w @nullproof-studio/en-quire
scripts.clean: npm run clean -w @nullproof-studio/en-core --if-present && npm run clean -w @nullproof-studio/en-quire --if-present
